zh.lifeSummary: 當Uriah Allard於1725年5月16日出生在美國康乃狄克州文達哈姆武德斯托可時，他的父親Matturin Allard44歲，母親Joanna Ainsworth24歲。他於1752年7月15日與Prudence Child結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1810年8月20日在他的家鄉享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Uriah Allard于1725年5月16日出生在美国康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可时，他的父亲Matturin Allard44岁，母亲Joanna Ainsworth24岁。他于1752年7月15日与Prudence Child结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1810年8月20日在他的家乡享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Allard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gilles, Andre, Emile, Normand, Marcel, Alain, Armand, Gaston, Pierre, Antoine, Benoit, Fernand.

English: from a Middle English personal name, Alard, Adelard, Aylard, or Elard. The former two names are usually of native English origin, from Old English Æthelheard, composed of the elements æthel ‘noble’ + heard ‘hard, bold’. Alternatively, the surname may be of continental origin, from an ancient Germanic name (see 2 below), which developed in Old French to Alard, and in Middle Dutch to Adelaert and Alaert. The continental names were used in post-Conquest England by Normans and Flemings. Later development of -ard to -ett and -att in surnames means that these personal names may also lie behind some examples of e.g. Allatt and Hallett .
French: from the medieval personal name Alard, from ancient Germanic Adelhard, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘hardy’. Compare Allar , Allor , Allord , and Allore .

variants.name: Ellerd
meanings: English (Bedfordshire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Allard  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.
Probably an altered form of German Ellert, a variant of Ehlert.

variants.name: Ellert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Merwin, Traude.

variants.name: Hallett
meanings: English (mainly Somerset and Dorset): variant of Allatt, itself a variant of Allard , with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Uriah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (from Hebrew, meaning ‘God is light’), borne by a Hittite warrior treacherously disposed of by King David after he had made Uriah's wife Bathsheba pregnant (2 Samuel 11). The Greek form Urias occurs in the New Testament (Matthew 1:6). The name was used occasionally from the 16th century onwards, but is now most closely associated with the character of the obsequious Uriah Heep in Dickens's David Copperfield ( 1850 ) and has consequently undergone a sharp decline in popularity.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: British Forces Capture Fort Griswold
historicEvents.description: The capture of Fort Griswold was the final act of treason that Benedict Arnold committed. This would be a British victory. On the American side 85 were killed, 35 wounded and paroled, 28 taken prisoner, 13 escaped, and 1 twelve year old was captured and released.
historicEvents.urlTitle: History of the Battle of Groton and The Burning of New London

historicEvents.title: Creating the Eleventh Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Eleventh Amendment restricts the ability of any people to start a lawsuit against the states in federal court.

historicEvents.title: Brass is Discovered
historicEvents.description: "In 1802, brass was identified in Waterbury, Connecticut. This gave the city the nickname ""The Brass City."" Brass dominated the city and helped to create the city. The motto of the city is Quid Aere Perennius, which means What is more lasting than brass? in Latin."
historicEvents.urlTitle: Connecticut History.Org- Birth of the Brass Valley

en.lifeSummary: When Uriah Allard was born on 16 May 1725, in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, United States, his father, Matturin Allard, was 44 and his mother, Joanna Ainsworth, was 24. He married Prudence Child on 15 July 1752. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 20 August 1810, in his hometown, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Uriah Allard est né le 16 mai 1725, à Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, États-Unis, son père, Matturin Allard, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Joanna Ainsworth, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Prudence Child le 15 juillet 1752. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 août 1810, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Uriah Allard am 16. Mai 1725 in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Matturin Allard 44 und seine Mutter Joanna Ainsworth 24. Er hat am 15. Juli 1752 Prudence Child geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 20. August 1810 im Alter von 85 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ko.lifeSummary: Uriah Allard(이)가 1725년 5월 16일 미국 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matturin Allard(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Ainsworth(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1752년 7월 15일 Prudence Child(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1810년 8월 20일 그의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Uriah Allard родился 16 мая 1725 г. в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Matturin Allard было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna Ainsworth, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Prudence Child 15 июля 1752 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 20 августа 1810 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 85 лет.
